meta.defaultTitle: Hat Naturel Resort Sapanca — Bungalow Retreat in Nature
meta.defaultDescription: A peaceful getaway in Sapanca. Premium bungalows surrounded by nature for an unforgettable holiday.

home.title: Hat Naturel Resort Sapanca — Bungalow Retreat in Nature
home.description: Boutique bungalow resort at the heart of Sapanca. Heated pool, sauna, jacuzzi-equipped triangle bungalows. Peaceful holiday in nature.

rooms.title: Our Bungalows — Hat Naturel Resort Sapanca
rooms.description: 1+1 and 2+1 triangle bungalows, heated pool lodges. 6 unique concepts. Unforgettable accommodation in Sapanca.

roomDetail.descriptionTemplate: {roomName} in Sapanca, surrounded by nature. Premium amenities, modern comfort and ideal accommodation for a peaceful holiday.

gallery.title: Gallery — Hat Naturel Resort Sapanca
gallery.description: Drone and ground shots from our resort and bungalows. Discover our premium holiday venue in nature.

restaurant.title: Breakfast — Hat Naturel Resort Sapanca
restaurant.description: Sapanca village breakfast, homemade flavors, unlimited brewed tea. Breakfast with a view of nature.

virtualTour.title: 360° Virtual Tour — Hat Naturel Resort Sapanca
virtualTour.description: Explore Hat Naturel Resort Sapanca with 360° Google Street View. Tour our bungalows virtually.

contact.title: Contact & Reservation — Hat Naturel Resort Sapanca
contact.description: Reach us for reservations, inquiries, and questions. WhatsApp, phone, email. Sapanca, Sakarya.

home.heroSubtitle: Premium bungalows nested in nature for an unforgettable stay.
home.aboutLead: A boutique resort where modern comfort meets natural living in Sapanca's unique nature.
home.aboutBody: On our spacious grounds we offer a children's playground, free parking, and 24/7 security for a peaceful holiday. Each bungalow is designed with a different concept; whichever you choose, you'll have a private retreat in nature.
home.roomsSubtitle: Exclusive accommodation options for every taste
home.locationSubtitle: At the heart of Sapanca, surrounded by nature

restaurant.title: Breakfast
restaurant.subtitle: Sapanca village breakfast
restaurant.lead: With the first light of morning, with nature's sound.
restaurant.intro: A delightful breakfast in Sapanca's fresh air, facing nature. Fresh, local, homemade — with unlimited tea.
restaurant.menuSubtitle: A table full of homemade flavours, freshly prepared each morning.
restaurant.teaLead: Traditional Turkish tea brewed on coal fire — refilled endlessly throughout your breakfast.
restaurant.hoursNote: We open with the first rays of sun.
restaurant.ctaText: You can reach us via WhatsApp for breakfast reservations.
